task_completion.description: Open the TitanicSurvival.csv dataset in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open, displaying the TitanicSurvival dataset in the spreadsheet view with the 'passengerClass' column visible.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'passengerClass' is treated as a nominal variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'passengerClass' column header or variable setup menu shows the nominal variable icon (typically three overlapping circles/Venn diagram).

task_completion.description: Select 'passengerClass' for the Chi-Square Goodness of Fit test (Proportion Test - N Outcomes).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Proportion Test (N Outcomes)' analysis panel is open, and 'passengerClass' is placed in the 'Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Include expected counts in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis options panel for the Proportion Test, the 'Expected counts' checkbox is ticked.

task_completion.description: Generate the correct Chi-Square Goodness of Fit results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The results pane displays a table for 'passengerClass' showing a Chi-Square (χ²) value of approximately 258.01, df = 2, and a column for Expected counts showing 436.33 for each class.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis result to TitanicGoF.omv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'TitanicGoF.omv' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory, or the main Jamovi window title has updated to 'TitanicGoF.omv'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Jamovi menus, dialogs, and panels rather than terminal commands or R/Python scripts.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane uses standard Jamovi formatting, fonts, and table structures, and does not look like manually typed text or a pasted image.

integrity.description: The file was saved using Jamovi's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation is visible through Jamovi's native 'Save' or 'Save As' dialogs, rather than just renaming a file in the file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chi-Square Goodness of Fit test (Proportion Test - N Outcomes) on 'passengerClass' should yield an exact Chi-Square statistic of 258.01 with 2 degrees of freedom (p < .001). The expected counts for each of the 3 classes (1st, 2nd, 3rd) should be exactly 436.33. The observed counts are 1st: 323, 2nd: 277, 3rd: 709.
